zh.Castle Cary, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特卡素 加里
zh.lifeSummary: 當Muriel Soulis於大約1280年出生在蘇格蘭洛包爾時，她的父親Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland15歲，母親Hawise Stewart24歲。她於1302年與Sir Richard Lovel 1st Baron Lovel在英國英格蘭薩默塞特卡素 加里結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1318年2月在英國薩默塞特卡素 加里享年39歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Muriel Soulis于大约1280年出生在苏格兰洛包爾时，她的父亲Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland15岁，母亲Hawise Stewart24岁。她于1302年与Sir Richard Lovel 1st Baron Lovel在英国英格兰薩默塞特卡素 加里结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1318年2月在英国薩默塞特卡素 加里享年39岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特。

nameMeanings.name: Soulis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Greek: possibly a nickname derived from Albanian shul ‘bolt of wood’, figuratively ‘brawny man’ and ‘tall dolt’.
Scottish (Ayrshire): variant of   Soule  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Shaulis
meanings: Altered form of Lithuanian Šaulys: occupational name from šaulys ‘rifleman’. Compare Soulis .

nameMeanings.name: Muriel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin ( see Muireall ). Forms of the name are found in Breton as well as in Irish and Scottish Gaelic, and in the form Meriel it was in use in the heart of England in the Middle Ages. The surname Merrill is derived from it. As Muriel it was at first used mainly in Scotland, but became more widely popular during the first half of the 20th century. Since then it has fallen from favour again.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Muriel Soulis was born about 1280, in Roxburghshire, Scotland, her father, Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland, was 15 and her mother, Hawise Stewart, was 24. She married Sir Richard Lovel 1st Baron Lovel in 1302, in Castle Cary, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in February 1318, in Castle Cary, Somerset, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Muriel Soulis est née environ 1280, à Roxburghshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Hawise Stewart, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Lovel 1st Baron Lovel en 1302, à Castle Cary, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en février 1318, à Castle Cary, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Somerset, Angleterre.

de.of Castle Cary, England: Castle Cary, Somerset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Muriel Soulis um 1280 in Roxburghshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland 15 und ihre Mutter Hawise Stewart 24. Sie hat 1302 in Castle Cary, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Sir Richard Lovel 1st Baron Lovel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im Februar 1318 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Castle Cary, Somerset, England und wurde in Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Muriel Soulis è nata il circa 1280 nel Roxburghshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Hawise Stewart, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Lovel 1st Baron Lovel nel 1302, nel Castle Cary, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel febbraio 1318, nel Castle Cary, Somerset, England, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Muriel Soulisが約1280年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotlandは15歳，母Hawise Stewartは24歳であった。1302年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトカストル カーイでSir Richard Lovel 1st Baron Lovelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1318年2月にイギリスソメルセトカストル カーイで39歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Muriel Soulis(이)가 대략 1280년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise Stewart(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1302년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 카스틀 카리에서 Sir Richard Lovel 1st Baron Lovel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1318년 2월 영국 서머세트 카스틀 카리에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트에 묻혔다.

pt.of Castle Cary, England: Castle Cary, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Muriel Soulis nasceu aproximadamente 1280, em Roxburghshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Stewart, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Lovel 1st Baron Lovel em 1302, em Castle Cary, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em fevereiro de 1318, em Castle Cary, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Somerset, Inglaterra.

ro.of Castle Cary, England: Castle Cary, Somerset, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Muriel Soulis родилась около 1280 г. в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Stewart, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Lovel 1st Baron Lovel в 1302 г. в местности кастл кэри, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла февраль 1318 г. в местности кастл кэри, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Muriel Soulis nació aproximadamente 1280, en Roxburghshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John de Soulis - Guardian of Scotland, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Hawise Stewart, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Lovel 1st Baron Lovel en 1302, en Castle Cary, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en febrero de 1318, en Castle Cary, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Somerset, Inglaterra.
